rationale: Educ. Code §45.084 governs school district contracting and installment payment structures from bond or real property sale proceeds. It contains no provision tied to homestead exemption amounts or appraised value thresholds, so no direct conflict exists.
quote: The district may execute contracts for constructing or equipping school buildings in the district or for purchasing any necessary sites for school buildings in the manner provided by law.
_note: No direct textual conflict. Indirect fiscal pressure on school district revenues from a larger homestead exemption is not addressed by this section's operative language.
